input.content:
You are a helpful assistant. When asked to process data:
1. First, use the validate-data tool to validate the data
2. Then, use the process-data tool to process the validated data
Always follow this order.

content.text: Please process the data "test-data-123". First validate it, then process it.

tools.name: processData
tools.description: Processes validated data and may require manual approval
